statement: These are recommendations only. They do not replace OWNER_BLOCKED or UNRESOLVED_SOURCE markers until the exact artifact is independently reviewed and signed by the selected release owner.

records.reason: Registry E-WAN-01 is NOT_STARTED, UNMEASURED, and locally MISSING. Selecting 12000, 18000, or 30000 ms would fabricate evidence.
250,000 NOOS is 0.025% of the one-billion-NOOS cap. At 256 minimum bonds, 64 million NOOS (6.4% of cap) is bonded and one-third-plus-one is about 21.333 million NOOS before price/liquidity effects.
A round one-billion-NOOS hard cap is simple to audit; all consensus arithmetic remains integer micro-NOOS.
Five exact 20-year eras halve by integer floor. Scheduled emission is 699,999,861,600,000 micro-NOOS, 138,400,000 below its 700 million NOOS envelope.
At six-second target spacing, 525,600,000 heights is exactly 100 nominal 365-day years; every later height emits zero.

Ninety percent remains direct base security subsidy; treasury is capped at 10%. At year one, scheduled issuance is about 18.065 million NOOS: about 9.032 million Ground, 7.226 million Witness, and 1.806 million treasury before missed heights.

records.proposal: witness floor; treasury floor; Ground receives exact remainder
records.reason: Matches noos-lumen's checked implementation and conserves every emission amount to one micro-NOOS.
Burn is the least discretionary base-fee destination and cannot recreate forfeited emission. Explicit tips retain a direct inclusion incentive.

Genesis allocation is capped at 30% of maximum supply. Category envelopes are exact, but no recipient, address, vesting entry, or root is invented; counsel and owner must supply and review the complete list.

proposal.rounding: burn floor; reporter floor; locked remainder

records.reason: A proven slash destroys or transfers 60% of the offense bond, pays a bounded 10% evidence incentive, and keeps 40% locked through exit. This is the already exercised test fixture split, proposed here as a reviewed production value rather than a code default.
The leak waits about 3.41 hours, then removes 0.5% of remaining nonvoter weight per epoch; nominal half-life is about 138 leak epochs or 58.9 hours. It affects future snapshots only.
Activation waits four epochs (about 1.71 hours), exceeding the two-epoch membership lookback. Exit remains locked about 145.6 days at target spacing, matching the evidence horizon.
About 145.6 target-spacing days gives public operators time to propagate and submit objective evidence while the bond remains locked.

A 12.5% full-block step approximately doubles price in six blocks while remaining bounded and integer-only. Parameter changes wait seven nominal days. Initial prices are explicit and carry no fiat-price claim.

B matches the 1 MiB frozen-candidate block-body maximum; D covers sixteen 256 KiB descriptors; G, V, and R deliberately bound work below u64 maxima and must still pass the A-FEES 24-hour marginal-cost gate.
One NOOS is simple, nonzero, reservation-bounded, and deterministic. It is an anti-spam floor, not a claim that it covers measured marginal cost; A-FEES must validate it.
Ten nominal minutes is over 1,900 times the modeled 302 ms soft-final p95 and well below the six-hour challenge floor. NEL remains disabled at genesis.
Adopts the implemented PROPOSED-G0 Grain v1 table with Rust/Go vectors; hint remains zero to preserve erasability.
Adopts the implemented PROPOSED-G0 Grain v1 limits so production parameters do not diverge from the vector-checked interpreter.
